What's better than seeing your friends build cool things? Seeing them build cool things and absolutely crush it 🚀

Cherie Chung and her team at Holly are hiring a Software Engineer to help modernize how local governments manage their workforces.

Quick details:
- Full-stack role (NextJS, TypeScript, PostgreSQL)
- AI/ML integration work
- 4-6 years experience needed
- $170-220k + equity
- Hybrid in NY/SF, platinum benefits

They're already serving 20+ cities/counties and just raised $2.2M. This is a rare chance to be an early employee at a funded govtech startup that's actually making government better.

Know someone who'd be a great fit? → jobs@hollygov.com

So proud of you, Cherie! 💜

#hiring #engineering #govtech

author.name: John Stoll
author.headline: Dad and Husband | Global Recruiter | Leader | Entrepreneur |

posts.postText:
Now Hiring: Senior Software Engineer | Regal Cinemas
At Regal Cinemas, every great guest experience starts with technology. We’re looking for a Senior Software Engineer to help shape the future of digital ticketing, mobile engagement, and in-theater innovation across our global circuit.
If you’re passionate about building scalable, consumer-facing technology — and want your code to power unforgettable nights at the movies — this is your opportunity to make an impact at scale.
In this role, you’ll:
 🎯 Design, develop, test, and deploy software that enhances cinema operations and guest experiences
 🚀 Own projects end-to-end — from concept through production release
 🤝 Partner with Product, Design, and Operations to deliver elegant, scalable solutions
 ⚙️ Continuously improve performance, reliability, and scalability across platforms
 💡 Contribute innovative ideas that elevate the digital moviegoing journey
We’re looking for engineers with:
 ✔️ 5+ years of professional experience
 ✔️ Strong proficiency in Next.js, React, .NET, and C#
 ✔️ Cloud, CI/CD, and modern architecture expertise
 ✔️ A builder’s mindset with a passion for consumer technology
This is a chance to blend creativity and engineering in an industry built on storytelling — with real scale and visibility.
If our values resonate — We Create. We Perform. We Inspire. — let’s connect.
#NowHiring #SoftwareEngineer #SeniorEngineer #TechJobs #DotNet #React #NextJS #EntertainmentTech #RegalCinemas
posts.summary: Regal Cinemas is hiring a Senior Software Engineer to shape the future of digital ticketing and in-theater innovation. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying software to enhance guest experiences. Proficiency in Next.js, React, .NET, and C# is required.

Looking for Core Team – Frontend Developer (Next.js)
We are building Mixdorm – a global travel tech startup for hostels and solo travellers.
I’m looking for a Frontend Developer (Next.js) who is not just a coder but someone who can also design beautiful UI/UX and modern frontend effects.
This is a core team opportunity for someone who wants to build something big.
💻 What we need
Strong knowledge of Next.js / React
Ability to create modern UI, animations and smooth UX
Good sense of design and frontend creativity
Ability to work independently and bring ideas
⏱ Commitment
Only ~3 hours per day
Remote
💰 Compensation
This is an equity-based opportunity.
You will be part of the founding/core team and receive company equity / profit share as Mixdorm grows globally.

Mixdorm is building a global hostel booking platform for solo travellers, connecting hostels and travellers across Asia and beyond.
📩 Interested?

posts.postText:
HIRING! HIRING! HIRING! 🚀 

We are seeking a talented Next.js Developer to join our dynamic team. You will work on developing high-quality, scalable web applications using Next.js, React, and TypeScript. This role requires a strong understanding of modern frontend architecture, performance optimization techniques, and hands-on experience with state management and styling frameworks.

#Experience. - 1 - 3 years
#Qualification. - B.Tech CSE/IT or MCA
#Location - Noida, Sector 63
#NOTE: INTERVIEW MODE IS OFFLINE 
#Job_type: Full-time

Note: Freshers are not eligible.

#Job_Description:
- Develop, optimize, and maintain scalable web ecommerce applications using Next.js.
- Implement responsive UI components using React, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript.
- Utilize Next.js Page Router effectively for dynamic and static rendering.
- Apply performance optimization techniques such as code splitting, lazy loading, and caching.
- Ensure cross-browser compatibility and responsive design.
- Participate in code reviews, provide constructive feedback, and follow best coding practices.
- Experience in Next JS, React, Tailwind CSS, ORM mapper usage, and usage of token-based authentication/authorization approach in practical experience.
- Key concepts of Next.js, i.e., Server-Side rendering and client-side rendering.
- Collaborate with backend teams to integrate REST APIs and GraphQL APIs.

#Skills_Required: 
#React.js (functional components & hooks)
#Next.js (Page Router, SSR, CSR, SSG, ISG)
#Redux (or Redux Toolkit)
#TypeScript
#Tailwind CSS
#Context API

#Preferred_Skills
REST API integration
GraphQL API integration
Cypress (end-to-end testing)
Next.js App Router
Performance Optimization & Code Splitting
Familiarity with SEO best practices for Next.js

Kindly share your resume: shivanichauhan.hr348@webkul.in

🔹 Can take a feature from idea → architecture → production
🔹 Startup speed. Zero hand-holding. High accountability.

If you love building 0→1 products, experimenting with AI, and delivering real impact — let’s talk.

📩 DM me or comment “Interested”
